auth.session_expired: Session expired, please sign in again.

today.mock_card.title: Mock interview
today.mock_card.body: The most direct way to test yourself — take an AI-mock with an interviewer for a specific company. Each section is graded, and the run ends with a summary report.
today.daily_brief.title: Daily brief
today.daily_brief.offline: Coach is offline right now — daily brief unavailable. Normal without an OpenRouter key in dev.
today.coach_insight.title: AI-coach insight
today.coach_insight.empty: No fresh insights. They show up after mocks and focus sessions — finish a couple in a row and the coach catches up.
today.atlas_weak.title: Weak nodes
today.atlas_weak.empty: Atlas is empty or you're just starting. Open the full graph to see the map of topics.
today.atlas_weak.ctx_template: Student is working on node «{{title}}» ({{section}}). Progress {{pct}}%. Explain what matters to close the gap.

tutors_discover.title: Find an open tutor
tutors_discover.subtitle: Free, no payments and no hourly rates. Send an application — the tutor replies, and you start working on the chosen track.
tutors_discover.empty_filters: No public tutors match these filters yet.
tutors_discover.empty_hint: Try clearing filters or come back later — tutors appear as they open their profiles.
tutors_discover.application_sent_body: The tutor will see it on their dashboard. If they accept — you'll show up in their student list and can start working.
tutors_discover.apply_subtitle: Free. Tell the tutor what you're studying and what help you need — that helps them decide if you're a fit.
tutors_discover.message_placeholder: What do you want to level up? What's your current experience?

podcasts_full.title: What to put on in the background
podcasts_full.body_suffix: on interview prep, senior IT, ML, English. Listen on the go — every completed episode is logged into your trajectory.
podcasts_full.empty_body: Catalog is empty or nothing matches the filter.

memory_full.title: What AI remembers
memory_full.subtitle: Full list of memory entries the coach relies on. Delete an entry — AI no longer uses it in the next session. This is your memory; you decide what AI keeps.
memory_full.empty_body: Coach hasn't recorded anything yet. Entries will appear after the first session / mock / diagnostic.
memory_full.delete_title: AI will no longer use this

legal_terms.title: druz9 Terms of Use
legal_terms.section1.p: druz9 is an ecosystem of three products: druz9.ru (web arena, ranking, mock interviews), Hone (desktop focus cockpit), and Cue (stealth AI-copilot). All three run under a single account and a single subscription.
legal_terms.section2.p: Registration is via Yandex ID or Telegram. We don't store emails or passwords. You're responsible for keeping access to your provider account (Yandex/Telegram) safe; a compromised provider account = compromised druz9 account.
legal_terms.section3.p: Pro costs 790 ₽/month and unlocks AI features across the ecosystem (daily plan generation, AI whiteboard critique, link suggestions in notes, stealth copilot in Cue, Arena Pro on druz9.ru). Cancel anytime in profile settings; after cancellation Pro stays active until the end of the paid period.
legal_terms.section4.p_pre: Notes and whiteboard state are visible only to you, encrypted at rest, and never enter Arena / ranking / public collections. Focus sessions are used to build private stats and never shared with third parties. Details — see
legal_terms.section5.li1: Automated requests to AI endpoints by bots / scripts.
legal_terms.section5.li2: Attempts to bypass rate limits (10 req/min for Suggest, 1/5 min for GeneratePlan force-regeneration).
legal_terms.section5.li3: Reverse-engineering of binary artifacts (Hone DMG, Cue binary), publishing modified builds.
legal_terms.section5.li4: Content farming to manipulate the ranking.
legal_terms.section6.p: AI replies (plan, critique, mock feedback) are best-effort language model output, not a replacement for real review / preparation. Treat them as hints, not as a source of truth. We're not liable for decisions made based on AI output.
legal_terms.section7.p: You can delete your account anytime from profile settings — notes, sessions, subscription are wiped. We can disable an account for violating clause 5 or on suspicion of fraud/compromise, with a notice via the contact channel you provided.
legal_terms.section8.p: Term changes are published here, the update date is at the top. Material changes (subscription price, free tier scope) are announced 30 days in advance via your contact channel or in the app.
legal_terms.footer_note: This text is a minimum working contract for public beta; final lawyer review will be done before the public v1 launch date.

status_full.title: druz9 status
status_full.error_body: Could not load the status page. Try again later.

task_board.no_tasks_b: AI-coach is analysing your activity and will soon suggest personal tasks

trajectory_card.empty: Log is empty. Every logged activity shows up here as a point on the trajectory. After 7-14 days you'll see week-vs-week trend.

goal_readiness.no_goal_body: Without a goal the coach drifts. Set one — and get a deterministic readiness % + weekly milestones + a predictive plan.
goal_readiness.coach_med: Open Coach — what to close first →
goal_readiness.coach_high: Open Coach — test yourself on a mock →

daily_plan_card.no_goal_body: Set a goal — and get 3-5 actions adapted to your readiness and weak area.
daily_plan_card.hone_title: Open Hone and start a pomodoro for this action

insight_strip.empty: No insights yet — they'll appear once you log some activity.

algo_stage.no_tasks: This stage has no tasks configured in the company pool yet. Ask an admin to add a mock_task via /admin → Mock Tasks.
algo_stage.no_task_solve: No task_solve attempt for the Algo stage in this pipeline. Check the backend orchestrator's materialisation.
algo_stage.wait_judging: Wait for AI to grade all answers
algo_stage.tests_not_run: Tests have not been run yet
algo_stage.tests_hint_mid: to run code in the sandbox. Final verdict —
algo_stage.sandbox_unsupported: Sandbox for this language is not wired up yet — Run tests will return unavailable.
algo_stage.sandbox_unavailable_body_pre: Judge0 is not connected, doesn't support this language, or the task has no test cases. You can still
algo_stage.sandbox_unavailable_body_post: — the LLM judge will assess logic.

insights.coach_offline_body: Daily brief is unavailable — the LLM chain isn't responding or there's no data yet. Try again later.
insights.atlas_blurb: Skill snapshot: what's mastered, what you're learning, what's starting to decay. Refreshes after mock interviews, kata solves, and matches.

leaderboard.fair_tooltip: Counts only pipelines passed with the AI assistant turned off.
leaderboard.empty: No fair-mode mock interviews completed yet. Be the first — run a pipeline with the AI assistant off.

all_set.title: Done!
all_set.subtitle: Track picked, Atlas built. Next up — first mock and AI-coach with memory.

reward2.title: Skill Atlas
reward2.sub: Map of your progress per track

all_set.cta_sub: Strict mode with no AI and a watermark — an honest readiness check in 25 minutes

mock_debrief.coming_soon_body: Pipeline service is not active yet.
mock_debrief.radar_caption: Each axis is the normalised stage score (0..5). The indicator dot is the average across filled axes.
mock_debrief.fail_sub: More prep needed. Weak spots — below.

not_ready.title: Ready to debrief this answer
not_ready.body: The AI interviewer will read the question + your answer and prepare a «what could have been better» pass: an ideal answer + 3-5 pointed comments where you slipped. Takes 10-30 seconds.
not_ready.llm_unavailable: LLM providers are not responding right now. Try in a minute.

split.ideal: How it could have been better

focus.review_hint: Come back to this list before your next attempt.

base.faang: Goal — Senior @ {{co}}: high FAANG hiring bar
base.ml_offer: Goal — ML Engineer offer: narrow specialization
base.any_senior: Goal — Senior at any Co: broad market

status.between: Between offers — stress lowers learning efficiency

weak.sysdesign_high: Weak sys-design on staff/FAANG target — critical gap
weak.algo_faang: Weak algos on the FAANG screen round

time.lt_month: Less than a month to {{date}} — short runway

data_backup.title: Backup / Restore
data_backup.subtitle: Until backend persistence ships, your goal / activity / streak / mini-mock / Cue sessions live in the browser. Download a backup before switching devices or clearing data.

import.summary: File from {{date}}. Slots: {{goal}}{{activities}} activities · {{cue}} cue · {{mock}}{{diagnostic}} diagnostic answers · {{plan}} plan-days.
import.replace_warning: Replace strategy — current state will be overwritten by the bundle. Back up first if you don't want to lose your current data.

reset.body: Will delete: goal, activity log, streak, mini-mock, diagnostic, daily-plan, cue sessions, dismissed insights. Only restorable from a backup.
reset.done_body: Local data deleted. If you need to restore something — import a backup file.

err.version_too_new: newer (v{{version}}, current v{{current}}) — update the app before import

sysdesign.title: Sys-Design focus 45 min
sysdesign.rationale: Sys-design is your weak spot per diagnostic. Senior offers are out of reach without it.

algo.title: 2 LeetCode medium-hard (algo)
algo.rationale: Algos are your weak axis. 2 problems daily build working memory.

concurrency.title: Go concurrency drill (45 min)
concurrency.rationale: Channels / goroutines internals — your growth zone.

distributed.title: Raft paper + Kleinberg ch. 5
distributed.rationale: Consensus + replication — the backbone of senior+ sysdesign.

mock_pipeline.title: Mock pipeline (HR + Algo)
mock_pipeline.rationale: Active search / tight timeline — you need a mock every 2-3 days to stay calibrated.

mock_diagnostic.title: Mini-mock for baseline
mock_diagnostic.rationale: Readiness is low — you need a baseline to know where you start.

mock_checkpoint.title: Mock checkpoint (40 min)
mock_checkpoint.rationale: Mid readiness — a checkpoint shows where you get stuck.

coach.title: Coach check-in (10 min)
coach.rationale: The coach helps clear blockers and validate your plan — 10 min daily is enough.

codex_read.title: Read 1 Codex article (sysdesign)
codex_read.rationale: FAANG / staff trajectory — sysdesign depth pays off here.

reflection.title: Reflection: what worked today
reflection.rationale: 5-minute log of what you learned → coach saves it to memory.

diagnostic.title: Take the 8-minute diagnostic
diagnostic.rationale: Readiness is low because I still know little about you. The quiz will refine the plan.

tracks_tab.load_failed: Failed to load tracks. Refresh the page.

tracks_tab.subtitle: What you're growing in right now. You can keep several — e.g. «Senior dev + English». The primary track sets tab order and Atlas default.
